title: Equality ('=' vs '==' vs '===') in JavaScript
summary: In JavaScript, there are three types of equality operators: = , == , and === . Each of these operators has a different purpose and can lead to different results when used. Understanding the differences between these operators is essential for writing efficient and reliable code in JavaScript.
